mvw.input_scale: Monorepo full dependency install + runtime-core related vitest cases (single run, non-watch)
mvw.success_criteria: exit code 0, vitest completes with passing tests

environment.methodology: tutorial.md one-pass profiling; process-group/tree RSS sampled every 0.5s by monitor_tree.sh; peaks include child processes/threads; MVW actually executed.

static_triage.notes: TypeScript/JavaScript monorepo using pnpm + vitest; no explicit GPU dependency.

peaks_observed.cpu_utilization_summary: build and test phases are CPU-intensive with worker processes; RAM peak measured on full process group

min_hardware.summary: 2 vCPU / 2 GB RAM / 1 GB disk, no GPU. Raw process-tree peaks: build 1.3253 GB, run 1.8915 GB, disk 0.3270 GB.
